subcodes.first_line: O people of truth! On this Day ye are most worthy to behold the rose-garden of divine meanings and utterance, and to hearken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اهل حق امروز شما سزاوارترید از برای مشاهده گلزار معانی و بیان و شنیدن
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @call to action
